rag_rules: AGREE contracts must be placed inside annex agree blocks scoped to their owning component declaration
Use assign statements only for implementation-level output feature bindings in implementation scope
generic_rules: Assumptions and guarantees must reference only identifiers visible in the current component scope
Component type contracts should relate visible inputs to outputs without using implementation-only paths
Only place concrete bounds or named constants in type scope assumptions and guarantees
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE syntax includes assume/guarantee labels, equation declarations, constant declarations, and assignment statements
Component type annexes are for structural assumptions and guarantees; implementation annexes are for bindings
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names as AGREE variables without explicit model exposure
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
irrelevant_topics: Model fusion and validation repair patterns
